calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:40am

Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedekin, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept 525. Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Paul NouNou appears Pro Per. Respondents Katelyn Parks and Jody Owens both appear Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jedekin.

EXHR(A): Closing Statement "1006 Work 09 2011".
EXHR(B): Color Photo of outside of house.

EXHA(1): Reciept for flooring.
EXHA(2): Itemized Cost Sheet.
EXHA(3): 10 Color Photos of the inside of the property.

Evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.

9:59am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Judgment Entered
